fields.ActiveColor: The color when this screen is active.
fields.Label: The name of this screen.
fields._screenRoot: The root of the elements on this screen.
fields._screenCanvas: The canvas being used to render this screen.
fields._modalOverlayManager: The manager handling edit mode for this screen.
fields._button: The button to select this screen for the dash.
fields._iconTexture: The texture being used for the icon for this screen.
